UserPromptSubmit.command: if [ -f task_plan.md ]; then echo '[planning-with-files] Active plan detected. If you have not read task_plan.md, progress.md, and findings.md in this conversation, read them now before proceeding.'; fi
UserPromptSubmit.description: Remind agent about active plan on every user message for session recovery

PreToolUse.description: Read plan before tool use to keep goals in active context

PostToolUse.command: if [ -f task_plan.md ]; then echo '[planning-with-files] Update progress.md with what you just did. If a phase is now complete, update task_plan.md status.'; fi
PostToolUse.description: Remind agent to update progress and plan status after file changes

Stop.description: Check all phases are complete before the agent stops
